prompt:
[Subject] Refer to Image 1 and Image 2

[Pose and Expression]
Sitting relaxed on an antique brick railing with one leg down and the other bent on the railing. Hands held above the head lightly touching the hair, eyes closed with a bright smile, creating a dreamy and nostalgic atmosphere.

[Outfit]
Wearing a light and fluttering white sleeveless blouse with delicate lace ruffles on the neckline and straps. Thin ribbon detail at the front, paired with light blue wide-fit denim jeans. Dark brown leather shoes with thick outsoles and white socks.

[Hair and Makeup]
Long wavy hair falling softly to the shoulders. Subtle glow from night lights on the hair. Clean skin base with sharp features and moist nude coral lips for an urban yet natural charm.

[Lighting]
Ambient city light from the front and side gently illuminates the face against the night. Intense, warm golden night lighting from inside the Colosseum fills the arches, acting as a dramatic backlight for clear depth contrast.

[Texture and Mood]
Contrast between the rough brick railing, ancient stone texture of the Colosseum, and the dark night sky. The golden artificial light harmonizes with the blue denim for a seductive, romantic, and classic Roman night photoshoot mood.

[Camera Settings]
24mm wide-angle lens, aperture f/1.8, ISO 800, shutter speed 1/60s, captured from a slightly low angle. Sharp focus on the subject on the railing, with the massive building softly out of focus in the background.

[Background]
Night view of the Colosseum in Rome. Warm yellow lights in the arches showcasing architectural beauty. Dark road and metal safety fence below the railing, with tiny silhouettes of tourists in the distance.

[Signature] A small Threads logo at the bottom right with the name "CHAse" written in white cursive above it. 4.5 ratio
